subject: fix(ui): use SNAP_HALF constant for initial bottom sheet height
body:
sheetSnap was hardcoded to 50 instead of using SNAP_HALF (40),
causing the sheet to open at 50vh on refresh instead of the
intended 40vh snap point.

Tags: ui, mobile, bottom-sheet
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: patch
